title: Calavera configuration recipe
description: A repeatable project tooling recipe for create-project-calavera.

$schema.description: The published JSON Schema for Calavera recipe files.

profile.description: The base tooling profile used to compose the recipe.

packageManager.description: The package manager used for dependency installation and generated scripts.

integrations.description: Calavera integration IDs to apply. Some integrations include their required parent integration automatically.

scripts.description: Boolean package script flags. Calavera generates scripts for known enabled flags when the selected integrations support them.

lint.description: Generate a lint script when linting integrations are selected.

lint:fix.description: Generate a lint fix script when linting integrations are selected.

lint:changed.description: Generate an opt-in lint script that runs configured linters only against changed matching files.

lint:fix:changed.description: Generate an opt-in lint fix script that runs configured linters only against changed matching files.

format.description: Generate a format script when formatting integrations are selected.

format:check.description: Generate a format check script when formatting integrations are selected.

format:changed.description: Generate an opt-in format script that writes formatting only for changed matching files.

format:check:changed.description: Generate an opt-in format check script that checks only changed matching files.

typecheck.description: Generate a TypeScript typecheck script when the TypeScript integration is selected.

quality.description: Generate a combined quality script from the available lint, format, typecheck, and React Doctor scripts.

quality:changed.description: Generate an opt-in combined quality script from changed-file lint and format checks plus React Doctor diff when available.

ai.description: Optional bundled AI skills, hooks, and agents to install under .agents/, or under .codex/agents/ when adapting agent artifacts with target codex.

src.description: Path to a bundled artifact under src/ai/.

target.description: Output target directory name for hook and agent artifacts. Use target codex on agent artifacts to generate Codex custom-agent TOML under .codex/agents/. Skill artifacts do not use target.
